title: Alba Iulia, Alba — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Alba Iulia, Alba: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Alba Iulia is a city in Alba with a population of 63,536. The site of Romania’s Great Union of 1918, a city with a magnificent Vauban-style star fortress, Roman ruins, and deep historical significance.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
